props.name: empty
props.comment: The component to display when the field value is empty. Defaults to empty string.

props.name: ping
props.comment: Space-separated list of URLs to which a `POST` request is sent when the link is followed. Passes through to the underlying `<a>` element.

props.name: rel
props.comment: Relationship of the linked URL (e.g. `noopener noreferrer`). Passes through to the underlying `<a>` element.

props.name: src
props.comment: The source of the link to the file, for an array of files.
